mapper.select: SELECT PWF.PA_WORK_FLOW_NO, PPS.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, TO_CHAR(PPS.HR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') HR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(PPS.HR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') HR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(PPS.AR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(PPS.AR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AR_END_DATE, OBJ_CREATE_FLAG, AR_MONTH_CAL_FLAG, PA_CAL_FLAG, PA_CONFIRM_FLAG, PA_OPEN_FLAG, PPS.AR_LOCK_FLAG, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PA_PAY_OBJECT PPO WHERE PPO.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = PPS.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO AND PPO.ACTIVITY = 1 AND PPO.INCLUDE_TYPE = 1) EMP_COUNT FROM PA_PAY_SCHEDULE PPS, PA_WORK_FLOW PWF WHERE PPS.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = PWF.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO AND PPS.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PPS.ACTIVITY = 1 AND PPS.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_WORK_FLOW ( PA_WORK_FLOW_NO, PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( PA_WORK_FLOW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )
